title: Modded Swords x Punchy! v2
description: This texture pack adds compatibility with the punchy! mod when rotating objects (now with support for Forge-exclusive mods).
body:
This version of Forge adds compatibility with Forge mods (and probably NeoForge mods) when using [punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa)
---
I know there are only a few mods, but I'll keep working on your requests. Remember that I'll only make mods available for 1.21.1 and 1.20.1, regardless of the loader :)

### mods compatible 1.20.1 - 1.21.1
1. [cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm)
2. [dixtas armory](https://modrinth.com/mod/dixtas-armory)
3. [gobber2 + simply swords compact](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gobber)
4. [irons spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
5. [spartan weaponry + modded material ](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry)
6. [fabled weaponry](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabled-weaponry)
7. [terramity](https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity)

Looking for more compatible mods? Use [punchy! compatibility](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/punchy!-compatibility)

This version may be compatible with [better combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) it is recommended to use the mod for a better experience.
